Judge Pro Tem: Joshu Klipp, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development is present. Represented by Michele Pupiro.
Attorney Michael Rossoff for the plaintiff.
Defendant Elizabeth Lockett is present.
Attorney Joanna Allen appearing for defendant in limited scope.


The Judge Pro Tem , litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of April 25, 2016 is vacated.
